name: DumbDisplay WiFi (Phone-Rendered Display)
description: Phone renders all graphics; ESP32 sends draw commands over WiFi TCP (port 10201). Zero LVGL, zero SPI, zero font atlas on the board. The board creates virtual layers (LCD text, LED grid, graphical canvas, turtle graphics) and the DumbDisplay Android app renders them on the phone GPU. Supports multi-layer layouts, touch feedback, image tunnels, and WebView layers. The display IS the phone screen.
